Remove transfer failed requests
Add DISAGGREGATION_TEST_FAILURE_PROB to simulate failure for testing
In chunk_cache, properly adjust num kv indices to free
Refactor: extract ScheduleBatchDisaggregationDecodeMixi

vllm.title: [Neuron] Update Dockerfile.neuron to use latest neuron release (2.23)

Update Dockerfile.neuron to use latest neuron release.
Fix neuron test failing due to incorrect order of dependencies installation.

vllm.title: Update default neuron config for speculation
vllm.author: elaineyz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Upstream fix to pass context encoding batch size = 1 and enable continuous batching in the default neuron config for speculation case
NxDI only supports continuous batching with prefill batch size 1. The default neuron config generated for Neuron speculation models previously omitted these settings,

vllm.title: Order sequence ids + config update to support specifying custom quantization layers
vllm.author: elaineyz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR upstreams 2 changes:

Order sequence IDs before passing into Neuron model forward, and undo the ordering once we get the output. Reason: NxDI currently expects input sequence ids to be sorted. While this design choice was originally made to facilitate Neuron async runtime feature; additional

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix MRoPE Errors in the Qwen-VL Model When Processing Pure Text
vllm.author: wulipc
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Users in our community reported that the VL model performs poorly on plain text input. Upon investigation, I found that in "plain text" mode, mm_kwargs is empty, which causes the function to return early. As a result, mrope_input_positions remains None, ultimately leading to suboptimal results in th

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add kwargs to RequestOutput __init__ to be forward compatible
vllm.author: lk-chen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added kwargs will capture unexpected args silently, without raising exception.
Libraries that depends on vLLM may want to work across multiple versions of vLLM. When these libraries use new args (e.g. kv_transfer_params) they no longer work with older vLLM versions.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Update bamba test model location
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: All links to the old location automatically redirect to the new location already.

vllm.title: [Doc] Support --stream arg in openai_completion_client.py script
vllm.author: googs1025
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add --stream argument to control streaming response via command line

Introduce --stream flag using argparse's store_true action to enable optional streaming output.

FIX None

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use random hidden states in dummy sampler run
vllm.author: abmfy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
During model initialization, we perform a profiling run and warmup using dummy tensors, without executing attention operations. As a result, the hidden states and logits produced during this phase may be meaningless and could contain special values such as inf or nan.
FlashInfer was updated to versi

vllm.title: [Doc] Add stream flag for chat completion example
vllm.author: calvin0327

vllm.title: [BugFix][CPU] Fix x86 SHM distributed module initialization
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Current x86 SHM distributed module initialization is broken due to naming conflict between TP group and EP group.
This PR fixed the problem by adding the unique_name as an identifier and only using the SHM module for TP because EP hasn't been enabled on CPU.

vllm.title: [Misc] improve Automatic Prefix Caching example
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
move to examples dir
improve the example

vllm.title: [Misc] Call `ndarray.tobytes()` directly instead of `ndarray.data.tobytes()`
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Call ndarray.tobytes() directly instead of ndarray.data.tobytes() when serialisation since ndarray.tobytes() is already implemented in C in numpy.
Followup on #17378

vllm.title: [Bugfix] make `test_openai_schema.py` pass
vllm.author: davidxia
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
by filtering out test cases to POST /tokenize endpoint that are known to fail with a reply of HTTP 501 Not Implemented.
Enable the test in CI.
FIX #18162

vllm.title: [Platform] Move platform check to right place
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt: platform provide check_and_update_config interface for device to set its own config value. The platform specified config check and set logic should not be in config __post_init__.  It'll limit other platform to address some case. For example, in some other oot platform, mla and chunked prefill may w

vllm.title: [Compile][Platform] Make PiecewiseBackend pluggable and extendable
vllm.author: MengqingCao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #11162
This PR makes PiecewiseBackend pluggable and extensible so that other platforms can easily implement their own segmented graphs.
Other platforms, including oot platforms, that extend to support piecewise static graphs should implement XXXPiecewiseBackend that inherits from AbstractPie

vllm.title: [Build/CI] Fix CUDA 11.8 build
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The CUDA 11.8 build is failing for a couple of reasons.
This PR:
Skips building moe_permute_unpermute kernels on CUDA < 12.0 in order to fix the CUDA 11.8 build. Also add a function to report whether the moe_permute_unpermute kernels are available. (Was broken by #14568).
Also disables FLASHINFER_EN

Usage:
bash ./install_nixl.sh [--force]

The current weight loading missed process_weights_after_loading() which is needed for a quantized eagle weight.
Model config arch can now be EagleLlamaForCausalLM or LlamaForCausalLM

vllm.author: sangstar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
V1 support, serializing and deserializing LoRA adapters using tensorizer
This PR implements Tensorizer support for V1 and allows LoRA adapters to be serialized and deserialized using tensorizer. A test is added to confirm this and serializing LoRA files can be done with the same script that can save

vllm.title: [AMD] [P/D] Compute num gpus for ROCm correctly in run_accuracy_test.sh
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt: With this modification, it's possible to run the accuracy tests on AMD hardware.  This modification just gets the correct SMI command and then uses it to get the number of GPUs.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Increase TP execute_model timeout
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The timeout for execute_model (forward pass) running in TP workers was set to 40 seconds but there are a number of reports of this being hit. We assume the workers are in a bad state when this happens and the engine goes into a failure state.
It's not clear in which cases the model forward pass take

vllm.title: [Spec Decode] Make EAGLE3 draft token ID mapping optional
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Small compatibility fix for EAGLE3 models which do not have the "d2t" mapping defined. In this case, the logits can be returned as-is.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Benchmarks] Fix a benchmark of deepspeed-mii backend to use api_key
vllm.author: tishizaki
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously, a benchmark can't run to a deepspeed-mii server with using api_key.
This patch is ported the implementation from
async_request_openai_completions() so that api_key can be specified.

Bug reproduction
server command:
$ python -m mii.entrypoints.openai_api_server --tensor-parallel 1 --mode

vllm.title: [Misc] Replace `cuda` hard code with `current_platform`
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Replace some cuda hard code with current_platform to make vllm more extensible.
This PR is a supplement to #14411.

vllm.title: [Hardware] correct method signatures for HPU,ROCm,XPU
vllm.author: andyxning
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Correct  inference_mode method signature for HPU. It should be a classmethod and has a cls as its input parameter. This is required to comply with parent class.
Correct inference_mode, get_device_name and get_device_capability methods signature for XPU
Correct is_fully_connected method signature for
